column1: Dead calm stare like a sealed secret
Wide eyed stillness with unnatural focus
Half lidded gaze with slow predatory patience
Eyes reflecting TV static cold and bright
Side glance sharp like a blade flick
Distant gaze like memory turned poisonous
Unblinking stare with eerie composure
Soft gaze with hidden threat underneath
Eyes narrowed assessing the room silently
Glasslike eyes with wet highlight shimmer
Piercing gaze framed by heavy shadow
Downcast eyes then sudden upward strike
Smiling eyes with wicked certainty
Vacant stare like sleepwalking trance
Tired eyes with haunted softness
Catlike stare with elegant cruelty
Eyes shadowed deep under bangs curtain
Gaze locked forward refusing to flinch
Eyes glittering like neon across water
Sharp squint like she sensed betrayal
